title: JOKOLO 10oz. (12cm X 5cm 50 PCS) Containers with Air tight Lids, BPA Free, Reusable Plastic Food Container, Disposable Bowl Round, Safe for Freezer/Microwavable/Dishwasher (300 ML) (50)
features: ✅ PERFECT MEAL PREP CONTAINER: leak-proof, airtight containers keep food fresh, make meal prep a breeze, and offer great convenience with durable, quick and easy-to-open lids. These plastic containers are leak-proof, durable, damage-resistant and safe for repeated use, preventing leaks and spills in your bag or freezer. The 10 OZ (12 CM X 5 CM ) size is ideal for stacking meals, which will help you organize your refrigerator and clean up the mess.

✅ MULTI-USE: These prep containers can be used for lunch, dinner, or breakfast, and the size is ideal for leftovers and takeout. The meal is ideal for transporting and storing rice, any type of protein, salad, dessert, and fresh fruit. In addition, the lids are leak-proof and seal tightly to prevent spills. The food stays fresh for a longer time because of it. Our container is also perfect for portioning meals for all exercise enthusiasts.

✅ DURABLE & DEPENDABLE: Our bento box containers are created from premium food-grade PP plastics and are designed with your health in mind. They have a very long lifespan, reduce cracking, and prevent from damage that occurs frequently with rival products. These plastic containers with lids are recyclable, environmentally friendly, and simple to clean.

✅ MICROWAVE, DISHWASHER AND FREEZER SAFE: These food storage containers are BPA-free and can be safely used in the microwave many times without damage. You can also put the bowl in the dishwasher for easy and convenient cleaning. These food containers can be reheated or frozen and can withstand temperatures ranging from (-22°F to 284°F) or (-30°C to 140°C). Reusable round containers are stackable and easy to store when not in use.

✅ QUALITY AND SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: We stand behind the quality of our products. We committed to quality and customer satisfaction. Our goal is for every customer to be completely satisfied with their order and shopping experience. If for any reason you are not satisfied with your purchase, we offer hassle-free returns and exchanges. Our friendly customer service team is always ready to help with any questions or concerns you may have
description: Perfect Meal Prep Container – Leak-Proof, Durable, and Convenient Storage Solution Make meal prep a breeze with our Leak-Proof and Airtight Meal Prep Containers. Designed for ultimate convenience, these 10 oz containers (12 cm x 5 cm) feature easy-to-open, durable lids that keep food fresh and prevent any leaks or spills in your bag or freezer. Whether you're prepping meals for the week, packing a lunch, or storing leftovers, these containers make organizing your fridge and maintaining a clean space simple and efficient. Multi-Use and Versatile Ideal for all your meal storage needs – lunch, dinner, breakfast, and snacks – these containers are perfect for storing rice, proteins, salads, desserts, and fresh fruit. The tight-sealing lids ensure food stays fresh longer, while the leak-proof design guarantees no spills during transport. Whether you're portioning meals for fitness goals or just need a reliable container for leftovers, this set is your go-to solution. Durable & Dependable Design Crafted from premium food-grade PP plastics, these containers are built to last. They are crack-resistant and tough enough to handle everyday use, offering a long lifespan without compromising on quality. They’re also recyclable and environmentally friendly, making them a smart choice for your home and the planet. Microwave, Dishwasher, and Freezer Safe Our containers are BPA-free and designed to withstand extreme temperatures from -22°F to 284°F (-30°C to 140°C). They’re safe for microwave reheating, dishwasher cleaning, and freezer storage. The stackable design makes storage a breeze when not in use, saving space in your kitchen. Quality and Satisfaction Guaranteed We are committed to ensuring you are completely satisfied with your purchase. If for any reason you're not happy with your order, we offer hassle-free returns and exchanges. Our dedicated customer service team is always here to assist with any questions or concerns. Choose the meal prep container that keeps your food fresh, organized, and ready to go – order today!
